title: Bits & Bobs
description: Adds various items, like mics, to Minecraft!
body:
This mod is one of those all-over-the-place mods, like Quark, which adds a bunch of random items into the game!

Currently, the only item is the Microphone, a cosmetic item you can hold in your hand and pretend like you're doing Karaoke with your friends. (This goes nicely with the [Disx](https://modrinth.com/mod/disx) mod, which plays YouTube songs in a jukebox.)
